tasks.label: 💾 SD: Mount boot & rootfs
tasks.command: echo '==== Auto Mounting partitions via udisksctl ====' && udisksctl mount -b /dev/sdb1 && udisksctl mount -b /dev/sdb2

tasks.label: 💾 SD: Unmount & Eject
tasks.command: echo '==== Syncing & Unmounting safely ====' && sync && udisksctl unmount -b /dev/sdb1 && udisksctl unmount -b /dev/sdb2 && echo '==== [SUCCESS] Safe to physical eject SD Card! ===='

tasks.label: 🚀 Compile U-boot
tasks.command: export ARCH=arm && export CROSS_COMPILE=arm-linux-gnueabi- && make am335x_evm_config && make && echo '==== Copying Build Artifacts to Output ====' && cp MLO u-boot.img ../output/ && echo '==== DONE! Files safely placed in output/ ===='

tasks.label: 📚 U-boot Menu
tasks.command: export ARCH=arm && export CROSS_COMPILE=arm-linux-gnueabi- && make menuconfig

tasks.label: 📜 Boot Script
tasks.command: mkimage -C none -A arm -T script -n '@BrandonEmbedded boot scr'  -d boot.cmd boot.scr && echo '==== Copying Script to Output ====' && cp boot.scr ../output/ && echo '==== DONE! Files safely placed in output/ ===='
